title: Ceriscoides sessiliflora
taxonomy: Ceriscoides sessiliflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to certain regions and is classified within the genus Ceriscoides, a group of plants commonly known as the 'wild oranges'. This genus is further classified under the subfamily Cinchonoideae. The family Rubiaceae is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants. Ceriscoides sessiliflora's classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within this family.
